overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a cowboy character walking through a New Orleans-inspired historic city. The character travels from a commercial street with a restaurant sign, past a stone church, through a courtyard, and into a narrow alley leading to a hidden garden area.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes from right to left across the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the cobblestone street passing under the restaurant sign

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving across the street from right to left

entered.detail: large red rectangular sign with white text hanging over the street
multi-story brick buildings with white iron balconies typical of French Quarter architecture
multi-story brick buildings with white iron balconies and shuttered windows
wooden utility pole with multiple crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a sunlit cobblestone street lined with historic brick buildings featuring iron balconies. A large red restaurant sign hangs overhead while a horse-drawn carriage crosses the street from right to left. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalks in this commercial district.

events.description: transitioning from commercial street to church grounds with stone architecture

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to the church fence, passing NPCs standing near the entrance

notable_agents.action: man sweeping the sidewalk with a broom near the church entrance

entered.detail: large Gothic-style stone church with pointed arch windows and tall spire
black wrought iron fence with stone pillars surrounding the church grounds
massive oak tree with hanging Spanish moss providing shade over the street

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the commercial area into a zone dominated by a large stone Gothic church surrounded by iron fencing. A massive oak tree with Spanish moss hangs over the street providing dappled shade. An NPC sweeps the sidewalk near the church entrance as the character walks along the fence line.

scene_state.functional_zone: church courtyard garden with brick pathways

events.description: entering the church courtyard through the iron gate

agents.ego_description: walking through the church courtyard garden following a brick pathway

notable_agents.action: child in white clothing running ahead on the pathway

entered.detail: enclosed garden area with manicured bushes and flowering plants
large weeping willow tree in the center of the courtyard
red and pink flowering plants along the pathway edges

segments.scene_description: The character enters a peaceful church courtyard garden through an iron gate. The space features brick pathways, dense vegetation including a large willow tree, and flowering plants. A child runs ahead on the path as the character moves through this sheltered green space surrounded by historic buildings.

events.description: exiting the courtyard back onto the cobblestone street
turning left to enter a narrow brick alleyway

agents.ego_description: walking along the street and turning into a narrow alley entrance

entered.detail: three-story brick building with green shutters and iron balcony railings on the corner
dark arched brick entrance leading to a narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The character exits the courtyard back onto a sunlit cobblestone street, passing a prominent corner building with green shutters. The character continues along the street and turns left into a dark arched alleyway entrance, transitioning from the open street to an enclosed passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow brick alley leading to hidden courtyard

events.description: emerging from dark alley tunnel into sunlit courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alley and emerging into a small private courtyard

entered.detail: tall weathered brick walls creating a narrow passage
dark brick tunnel archway connecting alleys
lush tropical plants and trees in the final courtyard
high brick walls enclosing the private courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow, dimly lit brick alleyway passing through a tunnel-like archway. Emerging from the darkness, the scene opens into a small private courtyard filled with lush vegetation, potted plants, and brick walls. The lighting shifts dramatically from shadow to bright sunlight as the character enters this hidden garden space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling historic city that gradually transitions from open commercial streets into a secluded, sun-drenched garden. It begins on a sunlit cobblestone street lined with brick buildings and iron balconies, moving past a red restaurant sign as a horse-drawn carriage crosses the path. As the character leaves the commercial district, the scene shifts into the dappled shade of a massive oak tree and the imposing presence of a stone Gothic church. The camera then follows the character through an iron gate into a peaceful courtyard garden filled with willow trees and flowering plants, before exiting back onto the street past a building with green shutters. Finally, the view plunges into a dark, arched brick alleyway, emerging from the shadows into a bright, private courtyard lush with potted plants and greenery.
